The drop is a giant shiny suspended sculpture that looks like it’s about to descend from space into the Alversjö playground – and when burners turn the lever, it sounds like it too.

Day vs Night: During the day, the drop is shiny like an oil drop - suspended in the air steel the is futuristic and surreal. At night, it appears blue like a water drop, due to the silver/blue lighting, which creates a silver lining/halo effect around the border of the drop – making it water-like. It is both mystical, hopeful, earthly and at the same time, alien-like in appearance. Changing the lights to yellow and red, it also looks to be a burning flame.
